content.thinking: Let me start by exploring the current state of the Kubernetes cluster to understand the setup and then make the necessary changes to enable OpenTelemetry in ingress-nginx.

content.text: I'll start by examining the current state of the ingress-nginx controller and related resources.

input.command: kubectl get configmap -n ingress-nginx 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && kubectl get deploy -n ingress-nginx 2>/dev/null
kubectl get ingress -n demo 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && kubectl get svc -n demo 2>/dev/null
